description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with all your ethnic and western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"UpperLeather upper with silver coloured straps criss-crossing on the toe regionSlip on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with grooves on the forefoot and a grooved rubber heel unit for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
